title: pleurosorus subglandulosus
intro: Pleurosorus subglandulosus, also known as the rock cap moss or rock cap pleurozium, is a species of moss that grows on rocks and soil in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of pleurosorus subglandulosus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
